About Organization

The Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) is a government organization responsible for recruiting personnel for the police force in Bihar, India.

The organization aims to select the best candidates for the police force and provide them with the necessary training and resources to serve the community.

About the Programme

The BPSSC Havildar Instructor Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens to join the police force in Bihar, India.

The programme aims to recruit 122 candidates for the position of Havildar Instructor and provide them with the necessary training and resources to serve the community.
